headline:
Chairman at W Ventures Holding (SFO)
                                                (W Group-W Invest-W Equity-W Estate) 
                                                YPO Member (Dubai Chapter)- Tiger 21 (Dubai-01)
summary:
“Be different, be daring, be anything that will translate your vision into success”.
That’s how I grew my first business 26 years ago into W Ventures, a holding operating in a wide variety of industries.
My business journey goes beyond marketing numbers, financial graphs and profit margins. In my mind, they all represent the relationship between people and their achievements.
I have always sought entrepreneurial ideas to drive positive change in the world, connecting people with their favorite brands, and marketers with their customers.
In 1999, I established Hypermedia in Dubai, the first Out-Of-Home Company to come up with exclusive in-store media solutions in the MENA region. We were lucky enough to grow the business into different Outdoor platforms, through launching the first Digital Malls Network in the region, creating unprecedented media opportunities for Hajj Terminal Airport in KSA, and winning the largest media project in Dubai “The Dubai Metro”.
Our growth would not have been possible without the support of our major strategic partners who believe in our vision, trust our deliverables and share with us the same interests and goals.
I am also inspired by the immense power of our team, whose hard work, talents and dedication have built the company’s reputation as “Creators of Impact” and positioned Hypermedia as the leading Digital OOH media company in the region.
In 2008, I established W Ventures Holding, a Dubai-based corporation, operating a diversified portfolio of businesses across a wide range of industry segments: Media & Communication, Digital, Gaming, Industrial Manufacturing and Retail Investments.
Most of my time today is spent on exploring new development strategies for W Ventures to diversify the media business and capture growth investment opportunities globally and regionally.
I am a lifelong optimist who learns from defeat even more than from winning; a philanthropist who is trying to make the world a more compassionate place; and an adventurer whose mission is to innovate interminably and turn great ideas into breakthrough experiences.

experiences.title: Chairman
experiences.description:
W Ventures Foundation Investment Portfolio: 
* W Group Holding (Media,Tech & Communication Investment) 
* W Invest Holding (Investments in startups, FMCG, manufacturing, fitness, and technology)
* W Equity Holding (Specializing in portfolio asset management)
* W Estate (Dedicated to managing and growing real estate assets)

www.wventures.me
